cases.question: What is the recommended starting dose for patients over 75 years old?
cases.reference_answer: 2.5 mg b.i.d.
required_facts: Starting dose for patients over 75 years old is 2.5 mgb.i.d.
cases.gold_passage_text: HOW TO USE? • Start with a low dose (5 mgb.i.d.) (see Guidelines, T able 8).
